title: Human League Heritage Squad
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Organization |image= |name=Human League Heritage Squad |type= |founder=[[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' |leader=[[Brimon Yarar]] |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=[[Human League]] }} {{Quote|But the workers today are from a Human League Heritage Squad, working to reveal our species' glorious past here on Corellia.|Brimon Yarar|}} '''Human League Heritage Squads''' were groups tasked by the [[Humanocentrism|Human-Supremacist]] organization [[Human League]] with uncovering [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] [[Planetary repulsor]] to use as part of their [[Corellian Crisis|insurrection to overthrow the Corellian government]], under the guise of wanting to learn more about human history on the planet. The heritage squads were lead by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brimon Yarar]]. ==Description== {{Quote|The only thing missing is the Human League armbands.|Han Solo|}} Their members wore Human League uniforms, though without the group's armband. ==History== {{Quote|We're glad to be here. We're all very interested to see what you're doing out here.''"''
''"''We're not doing much at all out ''here'', but come and take a look at what we're up to underground.|Han Solo and Brimon Yarar|}} In [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], members of a Heritage Squad were digging up ancient structures under the surface of Corellia, in order to find a device placed there by the [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]] thousands of years earlier, called a planetary repulsor in order to help in their plan to overthrow Corellia's [[Governor-General]], [[Micamberlecto]]. Their goal was disguised by claiming that they were digging up the structures for historical purposes. Yarar gave a tour of their dig site to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her [[Solo family|family]] while they attended a [[Corellian Trade Summit|trade summit]] on Corellia. ==Appearances== *''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Corellian organizations]] [[Category:Criminal organizations]] [[Category:Political factions]]
